description: Per-module project configuration for the docker module (M2). Lives at <projectRoot>/.claude/gan/modules/docker.yaml and is exposed via getResolvedConfig().modules.docker.

containerPattern.description: Container-name match pattern used by PortDiscovery (`docker ps --filter name=<containerPattern>`).

fallbackPort.description: Last-resort port returned by PortDiscovery when no other layer yields one.

healthCheck.description: ContainerHealth defaults: HTTP path, expected status, total budget in seconds.

expectStatus.description: HTTP status code that signals the container is healthy.

timeoutSeconds.description: Total budget for ContainerHealth.waitForHealthy, in seconds.

schemaVersion.description: Module-config schema version. Exact-match per F3.

title: ClaudeAgents docker module config schema, v1
